sections.title: 1. Executive Summary
sections.hint: Hook evaluators: client challenge, high-level approach, differentiators, value, next steps. Use only facts from the Q&As.

sections.title: 2. Company Background & Qualifications
sections.hint: Credibility: overview, certifications, relevant experience, track record. Pull from Q&As about company history, certs, similar work.

sections.title: 3. Technical Approach & Methodology
sections.hint: How you meet requirements: architecture, methods, tools Phases, standards. Map technical and functional Q&As here.

sections.title: 4. Project Team & Organizational Structure
sections.hint: Roles, org chart narrative key personnel, staffing. Use Q&As on team staffing, roles responsibilities.

sections.title: 5. Work Plan & Timeline
sections.hint: Schedule milestones dependencies delivery. Map schedule kickoff and timeline Q&As.

sections.title: 6. Risk Management & Mitigation
sections.hint: Risks mitigations contingencies QA. Map risk quality and issue-related Q&As.

sections.title: 7. Compliance Matrix
sections.hint: Table or bullet mapping RFP requirements to where they are addressed reference requirement numbers from the workspace.

sections.title: 8. Pricing & Cost Structure
sections.hint: Commercial narrative only use figures already stated in workspace answers do not invent prices.

sections.title: 9. References & Case Studies
sections.hint: Past projects customers testimonials. Map past performance and reference Q&As.

templates.attribution: Original outline; common federal-style response sections

sections.title: Cover / Transmittal
sections.hint: Short letter: offeror solicitation reference key commitments submission contents.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.hint: Evaluation-friendly overview of compliance and differentiators.

sections.title: Understanding of the Requirements
sections.hint: Restate scope objectives constraints show understanding map scope background Q&As.

sections.title: Technical Approach
sections.hint: Solution design standards integration security performance map technical Q&As.

sections.title: Management & Staffing
sections.hint: PMO staffing training transition SLAs map management and operations Q&As.

sections.title: Past Performance
sections.hint: Relevant contracts CPARS-style narrative use only cited experience from Q&As.

sections.title: Quality Assurance
sections.hint: QA QC metrics reporting continuous improvement.

sections.title: Subcontracting & Small Business
sections.hint: Sub plan flow-down OR state Not applicable if Q&As indicate no subs required.

sections.title: Cost / Pricing Narrative
sections.hint: Basis of estimate assumptions CLIN mapping only use numbers explicitly in workspace answers.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.hint: Concise overview value proposition differentiators.

sections.title: Solution & Technical Approach
sections.hint: Core solution architecture and how requirements are met.

sections.title: Delivery Plan
sections.hint: Implementation phases milestones dependencies go-to-live.

sections.title: Commercial Terms Summary
sections.hint: Pricing model timeline to contract key terms only from Q&As.
